name: BeReal
description: Social app that randomly prompts you to take a dual-camera photo once a day. See your friends unfiltered and in real time — no edits, no filters.

name: Bluesky
description: Decentralized social network built on the AT Protocol. An open, Twitter-like platform with algorithmic choice, custom feeds, and no algorithmic timeline lock-in.

name: Discord
description: Voice, video, and text platform for communities. Create servers with channels, roles, bots, and live stage events.

name: Facebook
description: The world's largest social network. Connect with friends and family, join groups, sell in Marketplace, and follow pages.

name: Instagram
description: Share photos, reels, and stories with your followers. Explore trending content and connect with creators through DMs.

name: LinkedIn
description: Professional networking platform. Build your career profile, connect with industry peers, and find job opportunities.

name: Mastodon
description: Open-source, federated social network. No ads, no algorithm, no central server. Join any of thousands of communities or run your own instance.

name: Messenger
description: Facebook's messaging app for chats, voice and video calls, and group conversations — accessible from your browser.

name: Pinterest
description: Visual discovery platform for ideas, inspiration, and mood boards. Save and organise pins for recipes, fashion, design, and more.

name: Reddit
description: Network of communities for any interest. Upvote posts, join subreddits, and dive into discussions on virtually any topic.

name: Snapchat
description: Ephemeral photo and video messaging with AR lenses, stories, and Spotlight. Messages disappear after viewing by default.

name: Telegram
description: Fast, privacy-focused messaging with bots, channels, group chats up to 200,000 members, and powerful file sharing.

name: Threads
description: Meta's text-based social platform integrated with Instagram. Post updates, follow accounts, and join public conversations.

name: TikTok
description: Short-form video platform driven by a powerful algorithm. Create, explore, and share 15-second to 10-minute videos.

name: WhatsApp Web
description: Use WhatsApp in your browser. Sync chats from your phone in real-time for messages, calls, and file sharing.

name: X / Twitter
description: Real-time news, trending topics, and social conversations. Follow people, post threads, and engage with the world as it happens.

name: YouTube
description: Watch, upload, and discover videos across every topic. Home to creators, music, live streams, shorts, and long-form content.

name: Threads
description: Meta's text-based social app integrated with Instagram. Simple feed for following conversations and hot takes.

name: Behance
description: Adobe's creative portfolio platform. Showcase your design, illustration, photography, and motion work to a massive audience.

name: Discord
description: Voice, video, and text chat for communities. Originally built for gamers, now used by every kind of online group.

name: Reddit
description: Thousands of communities discussing every topic imaginable. Anonymous, upvote-driven discussion at massive scale.

name: Pinterest
description: Visual discovery engine for ideas, recipes, fashion, and design inspiration. Save pins to boards for later.

name: Nextdoor
description: Hyperlocal social network for neighbourhoods. Local news, recommendations, lost pets, and community marketplace.

name: X (Twitter)
description: Real-time short-form posting and news. Still the fastest place to see breaking events as they unfold.

name: LinkedIn
description: Professional networking, job hunting, and industry news. The default platform for career-focused content.

name: Snapchat
description: Disappearing photo and video messaging with AR filters, Stories, and Discover content from publishers.

name: Tumblr
description: Microblogging and multimedia platform with a strong fandom and artist community, known for its quirky culture.

name: BeReal
description: Daily prompt-based photo sharing meant to capture authentic, unfiltered moments instead of curated highlights.

name: VSCO
description: Photo editing and sharing app known for its film-like filters and a community without likes or comments.
